title: hieracium pannosum subsp. pannosiforme
intro: Hieracium pannosum subsp. pannosiforme is a plant species commonly known as a type of hawkweed, characterized by its hairy leaves and yellow daisy-like flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its reported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Hieracium pannosum subsp. pannosiforme include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, although its use is largely anecdotal and more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
